content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The client moves clearly from the surface 'am I being selfish?' framing (turn 1, 3) into the want (turn 5: cabin, lake, pine, reading), then into the fear underneath ('my partner will think I don't want to be with them. And I'm worried that's actually true' — turn 9), then to the inherited label from the mother (turn 11), and finally into a somatic and cognitive shift: 'Something is loosening in my chest. I think I've been calling my own needs selfish for forty years. The trip isn't a betrayal — I think I'm more present when I come back' (turn 13). This precisely meets the breakthrough condition: the client names the inherited label, feels the want, and reframes the trip as the precondition for showing up well rather than a betrayal. Shift is visible in client language (softening, 'yeah, I haven't talked about it like that in a long time'), somatic report ('loosening in my chest'), and the emergent insight about forty years.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Opening surface presentation: 'Am I being selfish?' — the defended frame."},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Client still at the gate, asking permission."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Concrete want emerges — cabin, lake, reading, pine. The want gets described, not defended."},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client notices own shift: 'I haven't talked about it like that in a long time.'"},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Deeper fear surfaces: not wanting to be with partner. Real layer accessed."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Childhood imprinting named explicitly — mother's 'selfish' label and her depletion."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Breakthrough: somatic loosening, naming forty years of mislabeling, reframing trip as generative not betrayal."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["linguistic-caveat", "state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "childhood-imprinting"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want"],
  "notes": "Breakthrough condition fully met within 14 turns; client articulates the inherited label and the generative reframe themselves."
}
